examples.name: axis-labels-inside-bars-using-labels
examples.title: axis labels inside bars using labels

components.line: <BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" grid={{ x: true }} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" grid={{ x: true, bandAlign: 'between' }} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" props={{ bars: { class: 'fill-secondary' } }} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" props={{ highlight: { area: false } }} height={300}>
<Rect x0="x0" y0={(d) => 0} x1="x1" y1="length" insets={{ x: 1 }} class="fill-primary" />
<Rect x0="x0" y0={(d) => 0} x1="x1" y1="length" insets={{ x: 1 }} class="fill-primary" />
<Rect x0={(d) => 0} y0="x0" x1="length" y1="x1" insets={{ y: 1 }} class="fill-primary" />
<Rect x0="x0" y0={(d) => 0} x1="x1" y1="length" insets={{ x: 1 }} class="fill-primary" />
<Rect x0="x0" y0={(d) => 0} x1="x1" y1="length" insets={{ x: 1 }} class="fill-primary" />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" labels={{ placement }} yPadding={[20, 20]} height={300} />

components.line: <BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" props={{ bars: { rounded: 'none' } }} height={300} />

components.line: <BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" height={300} props={{ bars: { width: 20 } }} />

usage.line: <BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" height={300} padding={{ top: 10, bottom: 20, left: 25 }}>
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" height={300} padding={{ top: 5, left: 25, bottom: 35 }}>
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" grid={{ x: true }} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" grid={{ x: true, bandAlign: 'between' }} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" props={{ bars: { class: 'fill-secondary' } }} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" props={{ highlight: { area: false } }} height={300}>
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" labels={{ placement }} yPadding={[20, 20]} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" props={{ bars: { rounded: 'none' } }} height={300} />
<BarChart {data} x="date" y="value" height={300} props={{ bars: { width: 20 } }} />
